description_long: This is an electric guitar with a solid body finished in a deep blue color, accented by a large white pickguard and chrome hardware. The body features a double-cutaway design, allowing easy access to the higher frets on the neck. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and white fret markers. The headstock is distinctively shaped, with all tuning pegs aligned on one side and a blue finish matching the body. The guitar is equipped with two pickups, a bridge and a neck pickup, along with multiple control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The bridge is metallic and fixed, and the overall construction suggests a robust, high-quality instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A blue solid-body electric guitar with a white pickguard, chrome hardware, and a uniquely shaped headstock. It features two pickups, multiple control knobs, and a double-cutaway body design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue body, white pickguard, chrome bridge, pickups, and control knobs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, neck length, and the alignment of the tuning pegs on the headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstock, neck, and the body contours without the pickguard or hardware details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the body thickness, neck attachment, and the curvature of the double-cutaway design.
attribute_headstock_design: Blue-finished headstock with four inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a slightly squared contour.
